metadata.description: QuantumAgent marketplace — three-layer quantum exploration architecture for Claude Code

plugins.name: cosmos
plugins.description: Three-layer architecture for quantum-inspired AI exploration: CLI, YAML DSL, and Python primitives. v3.2 completes Path B with canonical quantum mechanics — CHSH Bell-inequality test (S ≈ 2.83), full quantum gate library (Pauli/Hadamard/CNOT/CZ/SWAP/Rx/Ry/Rz), density matrices + decoherence model, partial trace. Multi-scale macro layer with project spin + singularities. Four entanglement modes including verifiable heartbeat protocol.
